systems.name: Octopus Chile
systems.description: Chilean octopus fishery systems map from the Humboldt Current system.

systems.name: Non-urban Water Compliance (NSW, Australia)
systems.description: Systems map of non-urban water compliance in New South Wales, Australia, exploring interactions between regulatory, environmental, economic, and social factors.

systems.name: Salar de Atacama Lithium
systems.description: The Salar de Atacama represents one of Earth's most critical and contested socio-environmental systems, where the global imperative for lithium intersects with extreme ecological fragility, indigenous territorial rights, and complex hydrogeological dynamics.
